description: Learn the principles, methods and tools used to successfully plan, execute and manage projects, with a strong focus on procurement, supplier relationships and practical project management.

topics.title: Project Initiation
topics.description: Understand how projects are started, defined and approved.

topics.title: Stakeholder Analysis
topics.description: Identify stakeholders, analyse their influence and manage expectations.

topics.title: Project Success & The Project Manager
topics.description: Explore success criteria and the characteristics of successful project managers.

topics.title: Scope Management
topics.description: Define project scope and prevent scope creep.

topics.title: Time Planning
topics.description: Plan activities using scheduling tools such as Gantt charts and Critical Path Method.

topics.title: Cost Planning & Budgeting
topics.description: Estimate costs, build project budgets and monitor project finances.

topics.title: Project Crashing
topics.description: Reduce project duration while balancing additional costs.

topics.title: Procurement Planning
topics.description: Understand procurement strategies and purchasing within projects.

topics.title: Contract Management
topics.description: Learn how contracts are created, managed and monitored throughout a project.

topics.title: Buyer-Supplier Relationships
topics.description: Develop effective collaboration with suppliers and manage long-term partnerships.

topics.title: Project Execution & Follow-up
topics.description: Monitor progress, manage risks and ensure successful project delivery.

topics.title: Project Simulation & Practical Cases
topics.description: Apply project management tools and techniques through realistic business cases and simulations.
